  1. model.entity.detectable

Uses of Package
model.entity.detectable

Packages that use model.entity.detectable
Package
Description
model.entity
 
model.entity.detectable
 
model.entity.detectable.entities
 
model.entity.enemy
 
model.entity.enemy.entities
 
model.util
 
  • Classes in model.entity.detectable used by model.entity
    Class
    Description
    InteractableManager
    Main manager of the interactables entities, used to help with the interactions between Interactable (closer to the Player) and Player.
    LiftManager
    Main manager for the lifts and their floors, helping with their collisions, updates their positions and command given by the Player.
  • Classes in model.entity.detectable used by model.entity.detectable
    Class
    Description
    Detectable
    Detectable is a type of Entity that other than having the normal hitbox, it also has the dtcbox (detectbox), used to check if certain Entity is within it's dtcbox.
    Interactable
    Detectable entity that allows an additional interactions with the Player.
  • Classes in model.entity.detectable used by model.entity.detectable.entities
    Class
    Description
    Detectable
    Detectable is a type of Entity that other than having the normal hitbox, it also has the dtcbox (detectbox), used to check if certain Entity is within it's dtcbox.
    Interactable
    Detectable entity that allows an additional interactions with the Player.
  • Classes in model.entity.detectable used by model.entity.enemy
    Class
    Description
    LiftManager
    Main manager for the lifts and their floors, helping with their collisions, updates their positions and command given by the Player.
  • Classes in model.entity.detectable used by model.entity.enemy.entities
    Class
    Description
    LiftManager
    Main manager for the lifts and their floors, helping with their collisions, updates their positions and command given by the Player.

    LiftManager
    Main manager for the lifts and their floors, helping with their collisions, updates their positions and command given by the Player.
